overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring two massive holographic koi fish (one orange, one blue) swimming around skyscrapers. The camera maintains an elevated aerial perspective over a multi-level circular plaza with moving traffic, surrounded by neon-lit buildings and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level circular transportation plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic orange and blue koi fish cross paths in the center of the frame, swapping positions

segments.scene_description: An elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by two massive holographic koi fish swimming in a circular pattern. The orange fish begins on the left while the blue fish starts on the right, moving toward the center where they cross paths. Traffic flows continuously on the elevated highways surrounding the central plaza structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level circular transportation plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic fish complete their circuit and cross paths again in the center

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the plaza from elevated position as the holographic fish complete their circular path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow rotation as the holographic fish complete their circular trajectory around the plaza. The orange fish now occupies the right side of the frame while the blue fish has moved to the left, having swapped positions from the start of the clip. The neon-lit skyscrapers and flowing traffic maintain the vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, elevated rotation over a futuristic cyberpunk plaza as two massive holographic koi fish orbit the city center. It begins with the orange fish on the left and the blue fish on the right, both gliding toward the center of the frame where they cross paths above a multi-level circular structure. As the camera continues its steady sweep, the fish maintain their circular trajectory, weaving through the air amidst a backdrop of neon-lit skyscrapers and flowing highway traffic. The scene then shifts as the two creatures complete their loop, resulting in the orange fish occupying the right side of the frame while the blue fish moves to the left. This continuous movement finally settles on a mirrored composition of the plaza, with the holographic fish having fully swapped positions against the vibrant city lights.
